name: testWaitScopePerformEdgeAnalysis
title: testWaitScopePerformEdgeAnalysis
syntax: long testWaitScopePerformEdgeAnalysis(message frame, ScopeAnalyseRange analyseRange, dword flags, long thresholdStart long thresholdEnd, ScopeEdgeAnalyseResult parameter[], dword parameterCount, ScopeAnalyseHandle handle) //Form 1

long testWaitScopePerformEdgeAnalysis(linFrame frame, ScopeAnalyseRange analyseRange, dword flags, long thresholdStart long thresholdEnd, ScopeEdgeAnalyseResult parameter[], dword parameterCount, ScopeAnalyseHandle handle) //Form 2

long testWaitScopePerformEdgeAnalysis(frFrame frame, ScopeAnalyseRange analyseRange, dword flags, long thresholdStart long thresholdEnd, ScopeEdgeAnalyseResult parameter[], dword parameterCount, ScopeAnalyseHandle handle) //Form 3

long testWaitScopePerformEdgeAnalysis(char nodeName[], ScopeAnalyseRange analyseRange, dword flags, long thresholdStart long thresholdEnd, ScopeEdgeAnalyseResult parameter[], dword parameterCount, ScopeAnalyseHandle handle) //Form 4
description: Perform an edge analysis for falling/rising edges of a specific frame or a complete node.

parameters.name: frame //Form 1,2,3
parameters.description: The CAN, LIN or FlexRay frame should be analyzed.

parameters.name: analyseRange
parameters.description: The start and end of the transition time measurement. See Class: scopeAnalyseRange.
Define threshold level unit: 0 = Threshold level in mV 1 = Threshold level in %
Select signal for transition time measurement Only one of the three bits must be set (only valid for CAN) Bit 1 = 1 Use CANhigh Bit 2 = 1 Use CANLow Bit 3 = 1 Use CANdiff
Rising/falling edge selection Bit 4 = 1 Use rising edges Bit 5 = 1 Use falling edges

0 = Use last occurrence for transition time measurement, where the voltage level is above or below the threshold level. 1 = Use first occurrence for transition time measurement, where the voltage level is above or below the threshold level. All other bits are reserved and must be set to 0.

parameters.name: thresholdStart, thresholdEnd
parameters.description: The start/end threshold should be used. Can be defined as % or mV value. This values are used to measure the transition time of an edge.

parameters.name: parameters
parameters.description: The parameters should be measured. (See ScopeEdgeAnalyseResult)

parameters.name: parameterCount
parameters.description: The parameter count which are contained within the parameters array.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
